generated_exposure.exposure_text: As someone who values duty and order, I'm glad to see our leaders pushing for real strategic autonomy. The recent cyber attacks on critical infrastructure show we can't rely on others to protect us. Building our own capabilities isn't just about security - it's about maintaining our way of life. Those who say we should wait for international solutions are putting ideology before practical safety. We need to act now to secure our future.
